final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire data_in,
    output reg data_out
);
    reg stored_data;

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            stored_data <= data_in;
        end
    end

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        data_out <= stored_data;
    end
endmodule
